externalBlockers.name: latest_sub2api_stream_retry
externalBlockers.reason: The fresh stream retry reached sub2api and Kiro-Go, then upstream Kiro returned HTTP 429 temporary suspicious-activity limits for the selected account. This is external account state, not the TaskUpdate/TaskOutput tool-schema bug.

supersededBlockers.name: direct_postfix_tool_loop_retest
supersededBlockers.reason: Fresh retry produced a valid streamed LS tool input and a complete tool_result follow-up turn.

supersededBlockers.name: taskcreate_suppression_root_cause
supersededBlockers.reason: TaskCreate tasks[] is repaired to a single Claude Code TaskCreate input and is no longer suppressed in direct validation.

rootCause.symptom: Claude Code sessions could pause/interruption around tool loops after Kiro-Go suppressed task lifecycle tool calls.
rootCause.cause: After TaskCreate was fixed, real Claude Code logs showed TaskUpdate suppressed because status was emitted as an object, and TaskOutput suppressed because task_id/block/timeout used alias/string forms incompatible with Claude Code's schema.
previousCauses: TaskCreate tasks[] shape did not match Claude Code's single-task TaskCreate schema.
For streamed tool_use, content_block_start.input is only a placeholder; final tool input must be reconstructed from input_json_delta.
rootCause.fix: Flatten TaskUpdate status objects, normalize TaskOutput taskId aliases, coerce TaskOutput block/timeout scalars, keep task lifecycle tools prioritized during trimming, and preserve request-log suppression diagnostics.

researchReferences.anthropicToolUse: Official Messages tool-use contract uses assistant tool_use blocks followed by user tool_result blocks; stop_reason can be tool_use.
researchReferences.anthropicStreaming: Official streaming contract emits tool input through input_json_delta partial_json deltas; the initial content_block_start input can be empty.
researchReferences.anthropicParallelTools: Anthropic tools can be parallel by default; disable_parallel_tool_use is an explicit tool_choice control.
researchReferences.kiroGatewayComparison: jwadow/kiro-gateway keeps explicit Anthropic tool_use/tool_result models and streaming input_json_delta support, reinforcing repair-and-preserve semantics over silent tool-loop loss.

health: docker ps shows kiro-go and sub2api containers running

browserMcpStyleRun.note: Real Chromium Playwright was used because no separate Playwright-MCP namespace is exposed in this Codex environment.

latestReverification.details: REPORT.md section Playwright-MCP Style Full-Stack Re-Verification: 2026-05-19 13:04-13:09 CST
